title: The Police, Agra Act, 1854
full_text: The Police, Agra Act, 1854 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 185416 Act Number: 16 Enactment Date: 1854-07-28 Act Year: 1854 Short Title: The Police, Agra Act, 1854 Long Title: An Act to amend Regulation XI. of 1831 of the Bengal Code Ministry: Ministry of Home Affairs Department: Department of States Enforcement Date: 28-07-1854 TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles The Police, Agra Act, 1854 Show all section Section 1. Sections III. and VII., Regulation XI. 1831, repealed Section 2. Darogahs of Police to be subject to Tehseeldars. Section 3. Regulation XI. 1831, as amended, extended to Benares.
